description: A color photograph with no on-image text, graphics, or design overlays. It shows a smiling middle-aged woman (consistent with Secretary Kristi Noem) seated on an airboat, giving a thumbs-up to the camera. She wears a backwards camouflage ball cap, large over-ear hearing-protection headphones/earmuffs, a black long-sleeve top and a camouflage life-vest marked 'Onyx' and 'A/M/24', with sunglasses tucked into the vest and bracelets and a ring on her hand. Behind her is the airboat's large round caged propeller fan, and to the right sits another passenger in a purple polo shirt; the background is a bright blue sky over flat green wetlands/Everglades. The tweet caption reads 'THE SMILE OF A PATRIOT WHO KNOWS TOMORROW IS LABOR DAY'. The picture itself carries no graphic design.
